title: 在国外餐厅退菜不尴尬！3句地道英语✨

cover.style_keywords: 清新手绘风、暖黄餐盘背景、简约英文手写字体、小叉勺插画元素

slides.scene_title: 菜太咸/太辣，一口就皱眉
slides.correct_en: Could I possibly get this re-made? It’s a bit too salty for me.
slides.correct_cn: 这道菜能麻烦重做一下吗？对我来说有点太咸了。

dialogue.a: A: Hi, sorry to bother you — could I possibly get this re-made? It’s a bit too salty for me.
dialogue.a_cn: A：你好，不好意思打扰下——这道菜能麻烦重做一下吗？对我来说有点太咸了。
dialogue.b: B: Of course! I’ll take it right back and have the chef adjust it. Would you like something lighter?
dialogue.b_cn: B：当然可以！我马上拿回去，让厨师调整。您想要口味更清淡一点的版本吗？

slides.tip: 用‘a bit too…’软化批评，加‘for me’强调主观感受，不指责厨师；‘could I possibly…’比‘can I…’更显尊重。

slides.scene_title: 菜里有头发/异物，吓一跳
slides.wrong_en: This is wrong! There’s hair in it!
slides.correct_en: I’m so sorry to mention this, but I noticed something in my dish — would it be okay to swap it out?
slides.correct_cn: 不好意思提一下，我注意到菜里有个小东西——方便帮我换一份吗？

dialogue.a: A: I’m so sorry to mention this, but I noticed something in my dish — would it be okay to swap it out?
dialogue.a_cn: A：不好意思提一下，我注意到菜里有个小东西——方便帮我换一份吗？
dialogue.b: B: Oh my goodness — absolutely! I’ll replace it immediately and speak with the kitchen. Thank you for letting me know so kindly.
dialogue.b_cn: B：天啊，非常抱歉！我立刻给您换一份，并通知厨房检查。谢谢您这么友善地告知！

slides.tip: 先道歉（I’m so sorry to mention this）是老外黄金缓冲句；‘notice something’比‘there’s hair’委婉百倍，保全双方体面。

slides.scene_title: 上错菜了，根本不是我点的
slides.wrong_en: This is not what I ordered!
slides.correct_en: I think there might’ve been a mix-up — I actually ordered the grilled salmon. Would it be alright to switch?
slides.correct_cn: 可能这边有点小误会——我点的是烤三文鱼，可以帮我换成那道吗？

dialogue.a: A: I think there might’ve been a mix-up — I actually ordered the grilled salmon. Would it be alright to switch?
dialogue.a_cn: A：可能这边有点小误会——我点的是烤三文鱼，可以帮我换成那道吗？
dialogue.b: B: Oh, totally! Let me fix that right away — and I’ll bring over your salmon with extra lemon wedges on the house.
dialogue.b_cn: B：完全没问题！我马上为您更换——另外免费送您几片柠檬～

slides.tip: 用‘might’ve been a mix-up’把错误归给系统/流程，而非人；‘actually ordered’轻描淡写带出事实，不带火药味。

slides.scene_title: 菜凉了/没熟/明显没做好
slides.wrong_en: This is not good. Make it again!
slides.correct_en: Would it be possible to have this warmed up / cooked a little longer? I’d really appreciate it.
slides.correct_cn: 方便帮忙加热一下／多煮一会儿吗？特别感谢！

dialogue.a: A: Would it be possible to have this warmed up? It’s come out a bit cooler than expected.
dialogue.a_cn: A：方便帮忙加热一下吗？这道菜端上来时比预期凉了不少。
dialogue.b: B: Absolutely — I’ll pop it in the oven for 90 seconds and bring it back with fresh herbs.
dialogue.b_cn: B：没问题！我马上进烤箱热90秒，再配点新鲜香草给您送过来～

slides.tip: ‘a bit cooler than expected’暗示客观偏差，而非主观嫌弃；‘would it be possible…’+‘I’d really appreciate it’构成温柔闭环，服务生听了都想给你升杯咖啡。

slides.scene_title: 想悄悄退菜，但不想被当难搞客人
slides.correct_en: No worries at all — happy to just have this taken off the bill. Thanks so much!
slides.correct_cn: 完全没关系！这道菜直接从账单去掉就好，太感谢啦～

dialogue.a: A: No worries at all — happy to just have this taken off the bill. Thanks so much!
dialogue.a_cn: A：完全没关系！这道菜直接从账单去掉就好，太感谢啦～
dialogue.b: B: You’re so understanding — I’ll adjust it now and include a complimentary sparkling water on us.
dialogue.b_cn: B：您真的太体谅了！我马上处理，再送您一杯气泡水～

slides.tip: 主动说‘no worries’传递松弛感，‘happy to…’展现配合意愿，比‘I want…’少80%压迫感——对方反而更愿意多给你福利！

caption: 服务员端来一道你根本没法下口的菜？别憋着咽下去，也别一开口就踩雷——这3句话，让对方主动帮你换，还夸你‘so polite’！⚠️重点不是‘说什么’，而是‘怎么说’：把‘问题’变成‘小意外’，把‘要求’变成‘请求’，把‘我不要’变成‘我们可以一起解决～’✨你试过哪一句？评论区蹲一个真实战报！👇收藏这篇，下次点单前默念三遍～ #出国吃饭必备 #英语救急 #餐厅英语 #礼貌表达 #实用口语 #小红书学英语 #海外生存指南
